ai_summary: This document details extensive corporate restructuring at Aster DM Healthcare Limited following a scheme of amalgamation, featuring a significant overhaul of its Board of Directors and Senior Management. Key material impacts include the appointment of a new Managing Director & Group CEO, changes in board composition with new Independent and Non-Executive Directors (including those with Blackstone affiliations), and the re-designation of founding family members, Dr. Azad Moopen and Ms. Alisha Moopen, as Non-Key Managerial Personnel. These comprehensive changes, including amendments to the ESOP scheme (notably removing re-pricing provisions), appear to be a planned integration post-merger and do not present immediate red flags.
